About Our Brand

At SUNVENO, we are committed to providing only the best in mother and child products, including a full range of high-quality items for growing babies. By using professional product designers and using top quality materials, our products are ones you can rely to keep your child safe and comfortable. ", "highlights": "
  • ⭐2-in-1 Shoulder Baby Carrier: The shoulder belt stool combines a baby carrier, hip seat and storage pouch directly into one, taking the stress out of carrying a baby. And the baby carrier is detachable to use the hip seat alone; the storage pouch is attached to the hip seat and can hold baby items, keys, mobile phone etc.
  • ⭐High-Quality Fabrics: Cotton safety fabrics, high tenacity fabrics have a high strength fibre genus, toughness engaged, good elasticity. This makes the carrier stable and less prone to deformation and damage, and the baby carrier can be used for a longer period of time.
  • ⭐Ergonomic: The ergonomic design of this baby carrier makes it easy to adjust the position of the lumbar stool with the adjustable drawstring, providing a comfortable sitting position for baby without causing stress and discomfort to the fragile baby's hips like a traditional carrier. The rounded wide stool surface reduces pressure on the joints and is more conducive to the healthy development of baby's legs and spine bones. And with this hip seat design, the child's weight can be evenly distributed from the shoulders all the way to the waist and abdomen to evacuate the pressure that would otherwise be at the waist and abdomen, dispersing more pressure points and effectively reducing back pain for mothers who carry their babies for long periods of time.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Carry your little one with ease from newborn to toddler! This lightweight baby sling carrier is designed for busy parents who want comfort, support, and simplicity. 👶 For You & Your Baby Offers hands-free support for parents and cosy security for babies. Combines the snugness of a wrap with the ease of a carrier. Perfect for daily use! 🌬️ Cooling & Breathable Made from ice silk performance fabric that wicks away heat and sweat — ideal for SG weather. Keeps both baby and parent cool and comfy. 🔁 Multi-Positional Use as a sling wrap for newborns or upright hip carrier for older infants (up to 20kg).
